---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an addition or change
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**The problem**
What are you trying to do that Sluice doesn't support today?

**Proposed direction**
What you'd like — an API sketch is welcome.

**Which layer**
Where does this belong? (OS floor / ring / RPC / frame / multiway / gossip / fusion) — see
[docs/architecture.md](../../docs/architecture.md). Sluice keeps a deliberately small, layered core; additions
should fit an existing layer rather than bolt sideways.

**Alternatives considered**
Workarounds you've tried, and why they're insufficient.
